brand_dna.category: Australian water filtration brand selling home water filters, coolers, and dispensers direct to consumers.
brand_dna.core_belief: Clean, better-tasting water should be accessible in every Australian home through reliable filtration and support.
proof_points: Registered trademark brand (Awesome Water®) with its own product lines and spare parts range
Price Beat Guarantee stated in site navigation
24 Hour Help Line & Repair Manual for ongoing support
Physical showroom and retail locations across Australia (Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Brisbane, Adelaide and more)
Dedicated Forever Chemicals Removal and fluoride filtration product range
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, service-backed home water filtration with nationwide presence and a price-match promise.

voice_pillars.name: Confidently Superlative
voice_pillars.desc: Leans on bold, top-of-market language to signal category leadership.
voice_pillars.quote: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

voice_pillars.name: Whole-Home Practical
voice_pillars.desc: Frames products around complete, room-by-room coverage for the household.

voice_pillars.name: Support-First
voice_pillars.desc: Puts help, repair, and reachability front and center so buyers feel backed up.

voice_pillars.name: Value-Assured
voice_pillars.desc: Removes price risk by promising to beat competitors on cost.

phrases: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market

icp: Health-conscious Australian homeowners who want cleaner, better-tasting tap water and value reliable local support, in-home installation options, and a fair price.

personas.name: Chemical-Wary Parent
personas.description: A household decision-maker worried about fluoride and forever chemicals in tap water, moved by specific removal claims and family safety framing.

personas.name: Convenience Upgrader
personas.description: A buyer who wants instant hot, cold, and sparkling water at home, moved by the 3-in-1 dispenser and cooler convenience angle.

personas.name: Value-Checking Researcher
personas.description: A comparison shopper who cross-references price and specs, moved by the Price Beat Guarantee and 24-hour help line.

allowed.claim: Complete home water filtration systems for the whole house
24 hour help line and repair manual support
Dedicated fluoride filtration and forever chemicals removal range
In-person showroom and retail locations across major Australian cities

banned.claim: Calling the products 'eco-friendly' or 'sustainable' without proof
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claim needs specific, verifiable backing.
FTC Green Guides - requires verifiable substantiation not present on site.

banned.claim: Filtered water 'relieves' or 'cures' any health condition
banned.why: Prohibited medical claim not backed by the brand.

banned.claim: '100% removes all contaminants' as an absolute guarantee
banned.why: Unqualified absolute claim - use specific, provable reduction figures instead.
Unsubstantiated health/medical benefit claim outside compliance.
